output.formatted:
The Saskatchewan River starts at the confluence of the North Saskatchewan River and South Saskatchewan River (source location not explicitly listed in Wikidata as an entity). It flows into Lake Winnipeg (mouth location not explicitly listed as an entity in Wikidata).

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?source ?sourceLabel ?mouth ?mouthLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q3047 wdt:P156 ?source .
  wd:Q3047 wdt:P120 ?mouth .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?source rdfs:label ?sourceLabel .
    FILTER(lang(?sourceLabel) = 'en')
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?mouth rdfs:label ?mouthLabel .
    FILTER(lang(?mouthLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
```
